name: learning-signal-density-causal-pilot
objective: Measure external-sample efficiency, compute efficiency, and learning-signal density across train-only processing pipelines.
hypothesis: Transform and replay conditions can improve external sample efficiency relative to raw observations, but may lose on charged compute efficiency.
method: Generate synthetic causal domains, freeze train/validation/heldout splits by material-stimulus pair, train deterministic online and tiny neural learners, and report costed heldout metrics.

costs.internal_compute: Training tokens over epochs plus train-only selection, train-only rule induction, validation threshold search, ranked candidate scoring, train-calibration scoring, validation-scored MDL rule search and description length, transform token costs, and separately reported neural training operations.

splits.heldout_policy: Heldout pairs are never used by selection, transformation, replay, or training.
